name: datagen
description: Generate synthetic yet realistic datasets from a business context. Two skills: Dataset-Research, a standalone skill that fans out parallel web research, validates the numbers, profiles the real customer base, and produces a beautiful illustrated HTML report backed by a compact research.json, and Dataset-Generator, which calls Dataset-Research for grounding and then compiles a YAML recipe and builds multi-table datasets with referential integrity, distributions, constraints, and LLM text columns. Ships five reusable research agents, two slash commands, and a safe input-gate hook. Both skills need a business context and an objective before they do anything.
